message.reasoning_content:
We need to produce JSON for stage web-002-backlink. We have existing site/index.html. We need to create site/page-2.html that links back to page 1 (index.html) without breaking page 1. The validator page-2-links-index checks link_integrity. So page-2 must contain a link to index.html. Also all-html-parse validator ensures syntax. So page-2 must be valid HTML. We need to ensure link to index.html is correct. Use Home or similar. Also ensure page-2 doesn't break page 1. That means index.html remains unchanged. So we just create new file site/page-2.html. Provide content. Use minimal but valid HTML. Provide Back to Home. Also ensure no syntax errors. Use proper tags. Provide
maybe. But not necessary. Provide
. Let's craft content: Page 2

Page 2

This is page 2 content.

Back to Home

Make sure to escape newlines in JSON string. Use \n. Also escape quotes inside string: \" for attributes. So content string: "\\n\\n\\n\\nPage 2\\n\\n\\n
\\n

Page 2

\\n
\\n

This is page 2 content.

\\n

Back to Home

\\n
\\n\\n" Check: we need to escape quotes around index.html: href=\"index.html\". Good. Return JSON object with files array containing site/page-2.html. Provide notes: "Created page-2.html linking back to index.html." Return only JSON.
